nyheter.title: EU naval mission will now intercept Russian shadow tankers in the Indian Ocean
nyheter.summary: The EU has authorized its naval mission in the Indian Ocean to stop and board Russian shadow fleet tankers suspected of operating under false flags.

nyheter.summary:
U.S. and allied forces sank two warships off Hawaii during RIMPAC 2026 sinking exercise (SINKEX), showcasing joint HIMARS, Type 12, LRASM, and submarine-launched Harpoon strikes. nyheter.title: Amphib USS Tripoli Wraps 6-month Indo-Pacific, Middle East Patrol
nyheter.summary: Big deck amphibious ship USS Tripoli (LHA-7), lead ship of the Tripoli Amphibious Ready Group, wrapped up on Wednesday a six-month patrol that took the group to the Indo-Pacific and Middle East. Tripoli pulled into White Beach Naval Facility, Okinawa, on Wednesday to offload elements of the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit. Along with the embarked 31st MEU, the Tripoli ARG included Tripoli, amphibious transport dock USS New Orleans (LPD-18) and amphibious dock landing ship USS Rushmore (LSD-47). T

nyheter.title: US Navy moving forward on West Coast dock for aircraft carriers
nyheter.summary: The U.S. Navy is moving forward with plans to build a new dock for aircraft carriers on the West Coast.

nyheter.title: Japan Protests Chinese Destroyer’s Live-fire Drill Near Disputed Reef
nyheter.summary: A People’s Liberation Army Navy destroyer conducted a small caliber live-fire drill on Sunday within Japan’s Exclusive Economic Zone near Okinotori Island, the archipelago country’s southernmost island. Japan Defense Minister Shinjiro Koizumi revealed the live firing during his keynote address at the Farnborough International Airshow 2026 held Monday in the U.K. Local media Kyodo News reported that during his speech, Koizumi said the live firing, as well as China and Russia’s joint bomber flight

nyheter.title: Republican Senators Introduce Bill to Create Service Secretary for the Coast Guard
nyheter.summary: A trio of Republican senators have introduced a bill to create Secretary of the Coast Guard and Undersecretary positions as the civilian head of the 43,000-member service, USNI News has learned. According to the draft ‘‘Coast Guard Leadership Modernization Act’’ obtained by USNI News, the new Secretary of the Coast Guard position would report to the Secretary of Homeland Security and takeover many of the interactions the service had with the Pentagon, according to the bill text. nyheter.summary: BAE Systems revealed a new unmanned fighter jet on Wednesday, boosting Britain’s entry into one of the defense industry’s hottest markets.

nyheter.title: Multinational Crews Fly on U.S. Navy Poseidons for RIMPAC
nyheter.summary: Multinational crews are flying on U.S. Navy P-8A Poseidon Maritime Patrol Aircraft for first time during Rim of the Pacific 2026 exercise. U.S. Navy P-8As from the “Fighting Tigers” of Patrol and Reconnaissance Squadron (VP) 8 and the “Golden Eagles” of VP-9 are operating alongside a Japan Maritime Self-Defense Force P-1 MPA, a Royal Canadian Air Force CP-140 Aurora MPA, two Royal Australian Air Force P-8As and a E-7 Wedgetail Airborne Early Warning and Control aircraft, a Republic of Korea Navy

nyheter.title: OMB Wants Battleship, Aircraft Carrier Funding Anomalies in Latest Continuing Resolution Proposal
nyheter.summary: The Office of Management and Budget wants Congress to allow the Navy to start work on the Trump-class battleship program, buy more on critical munitions and fund long lead materials for future aircraft carrier William J. Clinton (CVN-82) in response to a House Continuing Resolution proposal to keep the government funded through the midterm elections, according to a summary of the anomalies reviewed by USNI News. From the report What GAO Found The Navy is currently 24 months behind in its efforts to modernize three DDG 1000 Zumwalt-class destroyers to host the Conventional Prompt Strike (CPS) hypersonic missile as part of its surface strike mission. nyheter.title: New executive order tightens defense supply chain waiver rules
nyheter.summary: A new executive order aims to make it harder for U.S. defense contractors to buy critical minerals and other materials from prohibited foreign suppliers.

nyheter.title: New Navy PAE Maritime Shipbuilding Office Reaches IOC
nyheter.summary: The new organization that will oversee surface shipbuilding for the U.S. Navy and one Coast Guard program has reached its initial operational capability overseeing major surface ship and aircraft carrier construction, according to a July 16 memo obtained by USNI News. nyheter.title: Philippine Sailor Injured in Violent Clash with China Coast Guard off Second Thomas Shoal
nyheter.summary: MANILA, PHILIPPINES – A Philippine sailor was injured today at Second Thomas Shoal following a clash with a Chinese small boat at the contested South China Sea maritime feature. The melee resulted in a blow to the head of a Philippine service member, according to photos and video released from the incident by the Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP). nyheter.title: Philly Shipyard to Build ‘Golden Defender’ Ship as part of New Missile Defense Program
nyheter.summary: Hanwha Philly Shipyard will build a new missile-range instrumentation vessel for the U.S. Navy that will support the Trump administration’s Golden Dome effort, White House Office of Management and Budget Director Russ Vought announced Friday. Dubbed the “Golden Defender,” the ship is based on the National Security Multi-Mission Vessel design that Hanwha is finishing for the U.S. Maritime Administration’s training ships. nyheter.title: USNI News Western Pacific Pulse: July 17, 2026
nyheter.summary: The following is a summary of major ship movements and exercises in the Western Pacific over the last week. In Hawaii The U.S. Navy-led Rim of the Pacific (RIMPAC) 2026 exercise is currently in its at-sea phase. The exercise began June 24 and runs through July 31 and is taking place at installations in Hawaii and in nearby waters. nyheter.title: Spanish Navy to Lead NATO’s Atlantic Task Force Until June 2027
nyheter.summary: The Spanish Navy has assumed command of NATO’s naval force dedicated to patrolling the North Atlantic and will lead the force for the next year, NATO announced Tuesday. From July of 2026 to June of 2027, NATO’s Commander Task Force Atlantic (CTF-AT) will be led by five Spanish ships, the Spanish Marine Corps landing force and eight ships from allied nations. Commander Task Force Atlantic operates under NATO Joint Force Command (JFC) Norfolk, which oversees NATO’s North Atlantic area of res

nyheter.title: USS Fort Lauderdale Returns from 11-month Deployment to the Caribbean
nyheter.summary: Amphibious transport dock USS Fort Lauderdale (LPD-28) pulled into Naval Station Norfolk on Thursday, capping off a nearly year-long deployment in the Caribbean, the Navy announced. The ship originally deployed as part of the Iwo Jima Amphibious Ready Group and supported missions ranging from the early January raid in Venezuela that captured the country’s former president, Nicolás Maduro, to multiple humanitarian aid and disaster relief response efforts in the region. “During its 334-day deploym

nyheter.title: Coast Guard Ends Middle East Mission, Moves Cutter Squadron to Western Pacific
nyheter.summary: The U.S. Coast Guard is transitioning its Patrol Forces Southwest Asia (PATFORSWA) to the Western Pacific, ending a more than 20-year forward-deployed mission in the Middle East. The Coast Guard’s Expeditionary Cutter Squadron that makes up PATFORSWA, which was previously forward deployed to Bahrain, will instead operate from Guam and the Pacific Islands, the service announced Wednesday. The transition from the Middle East to the Western Pacific is in response to national security requirements,

nyheter.title: UPDATED: Blue Angels Flight Debrief Complete: ‘No Problem’ Says Acting SECNAV
nyheter.summary: No one from the Blue Angels flight demonstration team will be reprimanded or face punishment after Acting Secretary of the Navy Hung Cao said there was “no problem” with a low-altitude pass made Wednesday above Pensacola Beach, Fla. “Flight debrief complete. No reprimands. No firings. No problem. That’s the sound of Freedom! Semper fi and Hooyah,” Cao said Thursday in a post shared to social media platform X alongside a three-second video of the flight.
